meta.name: description
meta.content: Hermes Agent — the open-source agent that grows with you. Native app for macOS, Windows, and Linux. By Nous Research.
Hermes Agent — The Agent That Grows With You
Hermes Agent — a standalone terminal app and a native application for macOS, Windows, and Linux. Install it and start a conversation with the agent that grows with you.
Hermes Agent — The Agent That Grows With You

meta.name: twitter:title
meta.content: Hermes Agent — The Agent That Grows With You

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: Hermes Agent — a standalone terminal app and a native application for macOS, Windows, and Linux. Install it and start a conversation with the agent that grows with you.

section.class: hw-vignette relative flex min-h-[calc(1360*var(--u))] items-center justify-center overflow-hidden max-md:min-h-[88dvh]

div.class: relative z-3 mx-[var(--hw-gutter)] flex max-w-[calc(1200*var(--u))] flex-col items-center gap-[calc(30*var(--u))] text-center

h1.class: flex flex-col text-[calc(132*var(--u))] leading-[0.88] font-light tracking-[0.03em] max-md:text-[15.5vw]

a.class: group bg-hermes-fg text-hermes relative inline-flex items-center px-[calc(30*var(--u))] py-[calc(20*var(--u))] shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(0,0,0,0.25)] transition-colors hover:bg-white pl-[calc(68*var(--u))] mt-[calc(20*var(--u))]

canvas.class: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-101 h-full w-full
